text: Graph mode colors: use project-configured status colors in WebGL renderer

status.comment: Follow-up regression fix: WebGL priority mode consumed SVG-style rgb(...) color strings from useGraphSimulation, but parser accepted hex only, causing gray fallback for all nodes and ineffective mode switching perception. Added cssColorToRgb parser (hex + rgb/rgba), wired WebGL priority path to cssColorToRgb, and kept status-mode mapping via configured project statuses. Added tests for rgb/rgba parsing in packages/frontend/src/webgl/status-colors.spec.ts. Verification: npm run type-check -w frontend passed; npm run test:unit -w frontend passed (13 files, 53 tests).
